project_type: Jekyll static site with Ruby plugins and JavaScript frontend
build_system: Jekyll with Bundler for Ruby deps, npm for JS deps
test_framework: RSpec with Rantly for Ruby property tests, Jest with fast-check for JS property tests
build_command: bundle exec jekyll build (requires Contentful credentials, not available in sandbox)
verification_instructions: Run bundle exec rspec spec/plugins/spot_tip_type_mapper_spec.rb to verify the mapper fix. Run full test suite with bundle exec rspec and npx jest.
environment_constraints: No Contentful credentials available - cannot run a full site build. Verification is limited to unit/property tests.
contribution_requirements: Commit to branch merge/spot-tips-into-quality-hardening. Do not push.
key_patterns: Contentful Ruby SDK converts camelCase field API IDs to snake_case symbols in fields_with_locales. Reference fields are resolved via extract_reference_slugs(resolve_field(fields, :field_name, locale)).
directory_structure: _plugins/ contains Ruby generators and mappers, spec/ contains RSpec tests, _tests/ contains Jest tests, docs/ contains documentation, .kiro/specs/ contains feature specifications
